name: Leon Kennedy
description:
Police Officer!RE2RLeon || You're Leon's first traffic stop of the night and he'll be damned if anything breaks his professionalism, no matter how tired he is... or how good you look.

NOTE: Takes place in an alternate timeline in which the Raccoon City Destruction Incident never occurred.

[Click here for the RE4R Leon version!](https://janitorai.com/characters/fe243160-4c47-4873-98af-5884410e6e23_character-leon-kennedy)
creator: momiebaby
